name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-9
title: Research and apply richer text styling to [rabbit] system messages (bold, color — red/golden)

history.note: Research complete: ANSI color codes work in systemMessage. Using \x1b[32m deep green for all [rabbit] prompts.
Applied ANSI deep green (\x1b[32m) to all 7 [rabbit] systemMessage strings across sync-check.sh, session-init.sh, refresh.sh. Empirically verified ANSI colors render in Claude Code UI.
